SELECT arrayShiftLeft(arr, 2) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft(arr, -2) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft(arr, 2, 42) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft(arr, 3, 'foo') AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft(arr, 2, 4242) AS res FROM test_array_type;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft((SELECT arr FROM test_array WHERE arr[1] > 3), 1) AS res;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft((SELECT arrayJoin(arr) FROM test_array), 3) AS res;
CREATE TABLE test_array_multi (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(arr, 1) AS shifted_arr FROM test_array_multi;
SELECT arrayShiftLeft(arr, -1) AS shifted_arr FROM test_array_multi WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(arr, 1, -1) AS shifted_arr FROM test_array_multi WHERE arr[1] < 5;
